comment.body:
I promised you a squeeze, you got the squeeze :))
I signaled you the bottom of it, hope you catched and enjoy the green blooming portfolio.
What I was watching is how the intraday order flow is evolving. Local long gamma exposure came at 5720/25, was hit twice. I wanted to see if vol actually take it serious that it goes down. Bcs if vol goes down, it means gamma dictates, meaning that line is support. 
I hit it, then took small profits at potential rejection lines only to save the profit. But its like 1 leg out of 5 lets say just to feel the ratio.
I chosed near ATM strike bcs I didn't expect violent squeeze up. But still got convexity. Thats it. 

 Hope you enjoyed all these 0DTE and ES trades during the week. I showed you what I mean by reversion trading. I'll do weeks like this in the future.
If you can, you can post testimonies on twitter.

Also, you can use my link and coupon to get 10% off on OptionsDepth were you can accurately monitor intraday 0DTE flow and positioning adjustments. Educational video is coming soon. 
This is how we rob them, like pirates ;))
my profit target was overshoot today as well, I go to the gym, aaand done for today. I must recalibrate some codes.
